data.body:
Decision log (var 14):
14. REBAR_FSCK_NO_MUTATE -> REMOVE. No genuine user scenario: fsck's ONLY mutation is removing a stale .git/index.lock (>5min); the flag downgrades that to a warn. No CLI flag; the only setter is the library's internal context manager (__init__.py) that round-trips read-only intent through os.environ so read paths (list/show) don't delete the lock. Fix: read paths call the scan with no_mutate=True via the EXISTING parameter (_scan(tracker, no_mutate)); CLI fsck always mutates; delete the env var + the os.environ set/pop smell.
